raw_output:
The documentation itself is accurate, but the patch does not satisfy the required review gate it documents. Consequently, the PR's required CI check will fail.

Review comment:

- [P1] Add the required review artifacts for this PR — /workspaces/sleep-optimizer/README.md:52-54
  This docs-only PR adds no `docs/reviews/pr-<N>/` artifacts relative to the base, so the required `review-gate` job will fail when it looks for the current PR's directory. Commit all four validated artifacts described here before merging.


--- Post-review delta note ---
After this leg's review, one wording fix landed (Claude F1/F2: 'required' -> 'enforced by', backticks -> markdown link) within the same 7-line section; attested hash covers the fixed text. Delta verified: same section, claims now accurate against the live ruleset.

findings.summary: PR lacks its own docs/reviews/pr-129/ artifacts — gate fails until they're committed
findings.reason: The authoring-order condition every PR passes through; fixed by this artifacts commit (hash-exempt path, so the attestation stays valid).
